hero.title: Technology Partners
hero.description: We collaborate with world-class technology vendors to deliver enterprise-grade IT infrastructure and security solutions. As an authorized partner, we bring you certified expertise, priority support, and access to the latest innovations.

brands.name: CyberArk
brands.description: Identity security and privileged access solutions focused on protecting critical accounts, credentials, and infrastructure.

brands.name: Palo Alto Networks
brands.description: Network, cloud, and SOC security platforms designed to secure modern enterprise environments end to end.

brands.name: Fortinet
brands.description: Integrated cybersecurity solutions spanning firewalls, secure networking, and protection across branch, campus, and cloud.

brands.name: Juniper Networks
brands.description: AI-driven enterprise networking and cybersecurity solutions for data center, campus, and cloud environments.

brands.name: Rapid7
brands.description: Security analytics, automation, and vulnerability management for comprehensive threat detection and response.

brands.name: DAS Security
brands.description: Security-focused solutions supporting resilient enterprise protection, visibility, and operational defense.

brands.name: Gigamon
brands.description: Deep observability and network visibility solutions that help teams monitor, secure, and optimize traffic flows.

brands.name: CrowdStrike
brands.description: Cloud-native endpoint, identity, and threat intelligence capabilities for real-time cyber defense.

brands.name: NETSCOUT
brands.description: Performance management, visibility, and cybersecurity intelligence solutions for complex enterprise networks.

brands.name: GTB Technologies
brands.description: Data loss prevention and insider risk controls aimed at protecting sensitive enterprise information.

brands.name: Genians
brands.description: Network access control and device visibility solutions for secure onboarding and policy-driven access.

brands.name: Bitdefender
brands.description: Endpoint and cloud security solutions focused on threat prevention, detection, and resilience across distributed environments.

brands.name: OpenText
brands.description: Enterprise information and application security capabilities supporting safer digital operations and risk-aware application environments.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose AMI?
whyChoose.description: Our core focus has never wavered since our establishment — we have always trusted in the partnership approach of shared responsibility and vision. We hold ourselves accountable to what we set out to achieve.
points: Authorized partner for 8+ global technology leaders
Over two decades of deployment experience across Indonesia
Certified engineering team with vendor-specific expertise
End-to-end services from assessment to ongoing maintenance
Proven track record in banking, government, and enterprise sectors
